metadata.title: Extension 00-01 to File Reference SysEx Message

fields.name: <len>
fields.description: Two 7-bit bytes: combined byte count of <dst-bank> and <flags>, LSB first. The <len>th byte following the <len> byte should be either an EOX message, or a data byte indicating the ID of another extension.

fields.name: <data>
fields.description: Data specific to the message specified by <ext-ID#1> and <ext-ID#2>

fields.name: <len>
fields.description: See above. This should indicate a size of at least 3 bytes. All bytes beyond the third byte and before than the <len>th byte following the <len> byte should be ignored.

fields.name: <dst-bank>
fields.description: Two 7-bit bytes: MIDI bank number, MSB first (MIDI CC0 followed by CC32)

fields.name: <flags>
fields.description: 7-bit byte: Bit field containing the following flags:

bit_flags.description: Source Drum flag. This flag indicates the target bank is a drum bank.
